caption: A young man with blonde hair, wearing round-rimmed glasses, silver over-ear headphones, and a dark navy blue t-shirt, is positioned in front of a computer monitor. He is speaking, with his mouth open and facial expressions shifting slightly across the sequence. In the background, a monitor displays a blue interface with the number "20" clearly visible in white text. To the left, blurred colorful lights are visible, suggesting an indoor gaming or streaming environment. The man remains in a steady close-up shot, though his mouth moves as he talks, transitioning from a wide open expression to a slightly more closed position. A black microphone is partially visible at the bottom edge of the scene. The background and his attire remain constant as he continues to speak toward the camera.
